Synopsis: Temporarily renames NJ Advisory Council on Traumatic Brain Injury as NJ Advisory Council on Traumatic and Acquired Brain Injury; establishes Acquired Brain Injury Fund.
Renames quail management area within Greenwood Forest Wildlife Management Area as "Dr. A. Hunter Wilcox Field Trial Grounds."
Reorganizes and renames DHSS as Department of Health; establishes Division of Aging Services in DHS.
Creates Veterans Haven North Council; renames current Veterans Haven Council to Veterans Haven South Council.
Renames Mountainview Youth Correctional Facility as "William H. Fauver Youth Correctional Facility."
Temporarily renames NJ Advisory Council on Traumatic Brain Injury as NJ Advisory Council on Traumatic and Acquired Brain Injury; establishes Acquired Brain Injury Fund.
Renames the "Crime Victim's Bill of Rights" act the "Alex DeCroce Crime Victim's Bill of Rights" act.
Reorganizes and renames DHSS as Department of Health; establishes Division of Aging Services in DHS.
Creates Veterans Haven North Council; renames current Veterans Haven Council to Veterans Haven South Council.
Renames Mountainview Youth Correctional Facility as "William H. Fauver Youth Correctional Facility."
